"Most people are white-knuckling their way through life, sterss levels off the charts. Working dead-end jobs paying off their loans, student debts and fucking lattes. 
That shit will kill you without clarity in your life, and nothing brings clarity like hanging off the side of a mountain."

the energy, the potential. Bend or break, you will find purpose. And in purpose, there is truth."

name: Grease

name: Vile

desires that could become dangerous if allowed to progress" 

-George L. Jackson

name: Coyote’s Mask
notes:
"Lived through this bullet. I'll live through yours." 
- Coyote

- Do not bother farming for this exotic through Coyote at Jefferson Trade Centre. Instead, farm Countdown with mask targeted loot. It is more efficient.
- The Jefferson Trade Centre mission becomes tragic when you realise that Espinoza is one of Agent Kelso's few trusted friends in DC.
- Agent Kelso was overly confident that Coyote wouldn't kill Espinoza not because she didn't care, but because she was in denial and couldn't believe
that anything bad could happen to him.
- Kelso and Espinoza's backstory can be heard on the Embassy classified assignment collectibles. Click on this cell to watch a video of that mission.
-A group member can receive all 3 damage buffs at the same time, However, a group member can only have 1 of each damage buff at a time
(e.g. if there are 2 CQC players, you will still only get +25% critical hit damage)

name: Catalyst
notes:
"We're still being tested. The only constant variable is fire"


-the status effect that give stacks do not include foam

name: Tinkerer
notes: "Why not both."

name: Acosta's Go-Bag
talent:
One in the Hand...




...Two in the bag
notes:
"You never know what you're going to need, so it's best to be prepared." 
- Eva Acosta, Urban Spelunker

- This backpack can drop with a variety of strap colours, namely red, green and purple. Gotta collect them all!
- Eva Acosta is a character from Division 1 who left audio logs all over the city detailing her exploration. Due to the nature of what she sees, these logs get 
increasingly disturbing. Click on this cell to listen to Eva's logs.
- Eva does not seem to be associated with any organsation, and even her spelunking crew seems to be a group of friends. It is evident, however, that she has
lived in New York all her life and cares deeply about well being of the city. For this reason, I chose to use a symbol from a redesign of the New York flag.
- The full redesigned New York flag is from r/Vexillology

name: Birdie's Quick Fix Pack
notes: "Get up, we're out of body bags."

name: Memento
notes:
"I took from those who watched, hunted, and collected, until only tgheir shadows remained. Now my watch has ended, so yours may begin."

- Inscription by an unknown author


- The name "Memento" is a reference to  the fact that Hunters keep watches of Agents they have killed as sick mementos. 
- The axes on the backpack are Hunter axes. These Crash Axes, the same ones found in planes. While usually used for breaching and rescue, 
Hunters use these axes to melee Agents who get too close.
- +5% Skill Efficiency grants +5% of every yellow minor attribute (skill haste, status effects, skill health...). +1% Skill Efficiency grants +1%.
- Memento is suspiciously similar to Prism Gloves, a joke exotic posted by Azurmen32 to the Division 2 subreddit. This is part of a running gag about 
rainbow roll items being good.

name:
NinjaBike 
Messenger Backpack
notes: "From the depths of hell, this has been resurrected as if it cannot die." The Priest

name: Collector
notes:
"Let's see the Division glue you back together after this."
- The Strategist

name: Provocator
notes: "One does not simply wear red into battle. A red knight is not afraid but ready to provoke ." - Anonymous

name: Beacon
notes: With Me.

name:
Tardigrade 
Armor System
notes:
An evolution of the reactive armour concept, ablative nano-plating was initially designed as a prototype technology for self-repairing heat shields on aircraft repeatedly entering and exiting planetary atmospheres.

- This is a science fiction version of ablative heat shielding, which is used primarily on spacecraft. The earliest description of this technology is
found in Robert H. Goddard's 1920 letter to the Smithsonian Institution, hence the faction logo. Goddard pioneered much of the technology used in modern space
exploration, and a lot of his research was made possible through a grant from the Smithsonian Instiitution.
- In reality self-repairing materials exist, but ablative heat shields do not self-repair. Instead, they are made in a manner which allows them to sustain greatly 
decreased wear from atmospheric re-entry.

name: Ridgeway's Pride
notes:
"You can tell a lot about a man by the way he bleeds. Me? I bleed for my country, and nothing else." 

- General Antwon Ridgeway

name: Bloody Knuckles
notes: "A broken watch is still a good memento." 13

name: BTSU Datagloves
notes:
"Pop always told me 'son, you're only as good as the tools you work with.' So I chose to work with the organisation with the best tools." 
- Galveston

- Galveston is the endboss of Camp White Oak, and was in charge of keeping track of President Ellis
- In real life, judging from crow's flight distance, Camp White Oak is most likely Camp David. This camp is a Presidental retreat, which makes the fact that the 
President retreated here a clever pun.

name: Exodus Gloves
notes: "I'd like to make a withdrawal."

name: Overdogs
notes:
"Start from the bottom and make your way up."

Note: Tier 3 is lowest, tier 1 is highest.

name: Rugged Gauntlets
notes:
"Can't say I invented this, but at least I had a hand in it." 
- Calvin McManus

name: Centurion Scabbard
notes: "it's better ti have more than one gun in your holster."

name:
Dodge City
Gunslinger's Holster
notes:
"Fast is fine, but accuracy is everything. In a gunfight... You need to take your time in a hurry." 

- Wyatt Earp

-Blueprint flavour text: Ed managed to put together this retro-modern holster blueprint using the parts we found, and some more modern gear.
- Dodge City is an administrative name for Ford County, Kansas. It is famous for being a "wild west" town in the past.
- Its seal features the Texas Longhorn Steer, a species of cattle that were brought to the town from Texas. In fact, the town was unintentionally created by a
rancher of these cattle.

name: Imperial Dynasty
notes:
"Symbols are important. Look at the phoenix you wear on your sleeve. The dragon bears a similar significance to me." 
- Faye Lau

- SPOILERS AHEAD
- The Lau (or Liu) family was the ruling family of the Han Dynasty in ancient China. The ancient Chinese were deeply superstitious and the founder of the Han 
Dynasty, Liu Bang, claimed that he was conceived after his mother dreamt of a dragon. This was a clever move considering that in ancient China,  dragons were a 
symbol of imperial power and represented the Emperor. 
- The dragon bears a significance to Faye because just like the Han rebellion in ancient China, she believes that she will wipe out The Division take control.

name: Shocker Punch
notes: "After getting sucker punched at the mall, I came up with a shocking solution." Anonymous

name: Waveform
notes: Graphite layers are suffused throughout the holster kevlar weave, that when the wearer moves creates an inductive oscillating electromagnetic field. This field allows for remote charging of electrical devices.

name: Nimble Holster
notes: "Run for your life."

name: Sawyer's Kneepads
notes:
"When I lost my leg, I thought that was it for me. But I found new purpose. I rose, just like the phoenix on my patch. Now it's time for these to find new purpose."

- Odessa Sawyer

- There is a deep irony in the fact that Odessa lost her leg to a sniper, causing her kneepads to become an exotic with a talent that greatly benefits players who 
use sniper rifles.
- Stand Your Ground does NOT cause players to ignore mortars in the Morozova fight.

name: Acosta Kneepads
notes:
"They got they asses caught by the JTF, but they don't have my mad parkour skills."
- Eva Acosta

name: Blacklisters
notes: Screw that one guy in particular.

name:
NinjaBike 
Messenger Kneepads
notes:
"Parkour! Parkour!" 
- an over-enthusiastic NinjaBike messenger

- I've worked 2 messenger jobs so far and I haven't met one person who knows how to do parkour
- I haven't met anyone who wears kneepads, either.
- NinjaBike doesn't exist, but Ninjavan is a real company.
- The type of vault that players do in game is most likely a clunky version of a speed vault, modified due to carrying a heavy backpack.
